subject:
Re: Warp crashes after trying to import coordinates from relion
 autopick
body:
Hi Dmitry,

I'm trying to Import Particle Coordinates so I can overlay the particles 
picked in Relion. I plan to extract a particles.star file with local 
defocus values.

When it asks for a suffix, I enter _autopick and it then crashes. The 
columns of my autopick.star file are:

rlnCoordinateX
rlnCoordinateY
rlnAutoPickFigureOfMerit
rlnClassNumber
rlnAnglePsi

Any ideas?




On Friday, October 26, 2018 at 5:23:02 PM UTC+1, Andrea Nans wrote:
>
> Hi,
>
> I'm trying to import an autopick.star file from Relion 3 into Warp but it 
> crashes each time. I would like to do the auto-picking in relion but take 
> advantage of the local CTF estimation in Warp.
>
> The file names match (ie the image is Micrograph_DW.mrc and autopick file 
> is Micrograph_DW_autopick.star).
>
> Is there anything that I'm missing?
>
> Thanks
>
> Andrea
>
>
